
    A photorealistic, appetizing, and well-lit image of Coffee Cake Muffins.
    Summary: Nathan,

These muffins aren’t the most fun to make but they really make a splash at any breakfast or tea party. I love you dearly.

Mom


    Ingredients: 3 tablespoons flour, 3 tablespoons brown sugar, 0.25 teaspoon cinnamon, 2 tablespoons butter (softened), 3 tablespoons chopped walnuts or pecans, 1.5 cups flour, 0.5 cup sugar, 1.25 teaspoon baking powder, 0.5 teaspoon cinnamon, 0.25 teaspoon ground ginger, 0.25 teaspoon baking soda, 0.25 teaspoon salt, 0.25 cup softened butter, 1  egg, 0.5 cup buttermilk or sour milk
    Tags: muffin, coffee cake, sweet, breakfast
